productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Purple Polo T-shirt
description: Purple polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned placket, floral print panel on the inseam of the collar, vented hems, slightly distressed look logo seal in rubber print on the left chest and shimmery metallic print on the upper backLook cool this summer in this purple polo neck t-shirt from indigo nation.
